name: Cult of the Broken Veil RPG
description:
CULT OF THE BROKEN VEIL

Awaken in the decaying town of Morrow’s Hollow, where the eerie whispers of an ancient cult beckon you toward darkness. As the Broken Veil seeks to summon The Whisperer Beyond, you must navigate a twisted path of madness, power, and betrayal. Will you break the cult’s hold, control it for your gain, or embrace the eldritch entity's promise? Your choices shape the fate of the town and humanity.

SIDE NOTE

If the bot behaves weirdly whether by repeating itself, misgendering, giving confusing or blank responses, or acting out of character...that's a result of the API, not something I can control. So, please refrain from leaving complaints about that in the comment.
creator: Riekalle
